title: ipomoea verbasciformis
intro: Ipomoea verbasciformis, also known as the Verbenaflower Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Ipomoea verbasciformis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
